title: MoneyCents
description: Canonical money value object (Constitution IV, FR-X-002). Amounts are ALWAYS integer minor units (cents). No binary float anywhere in any money path. Currency is CAD by default (Canada-first, Constitution II); foreign amounts carry their original currency and are converted to CAD via a timestamped FX rate before display.

amount_cents.description: Integer minor units (cents). Signed: negative for outflows/owed amounts. NEVER a float/decimal-string for an amount.

currency.description: ISO-4217 currency code. Defaults to CAD; non-CAD amounts MUST be FX-converted to CAD (arbitrary precision, half-up at the final cent) before user display.
